review_title: Does exactly what you need if you're looking for a time off management tool
description: I needed a tool to move out of Pause since it wasn't working for me, and I did not need a fully fledged HR management system, just a time off application, this was perfect for that purpose
author: Keylor A.
pros: It's easy to use and implement, it can be customized to multiple team needs and requirements where others tools had failed me
cons: It's rather expensive for what it does, we're currently looking to develop a similar app internally since the functionality, while effective, is not particularly sophisticated, at a lower price points we might've considered using this as a permanent solution
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great vacation tracking app - just give it a try!
description: Very good. I set everything up as I thought it should be, and scheduled a follow up meeting with the software support team to make sure I did everything right and to go over any questions. They were really great to work with. I am really impressed with how easy it was to set up and for users to use.
author: Tara S.
pros: The AI set up assistant was great! I found the software very intuitive to set up for our small team of 15 people. We wanted something simple where the team could record their time off in one place, and the Core plan has been really valuable! Best part, it is so easy to use, I didn't have to train anyone on how to use it.
cons: I think it would be great to be able to turn off email notifications for leaves set to auto-approve.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall it gets the job done (timesheet tracking) but the UX can be improved, and some settings can be more customizable
author: Eva F.
pros: Slack integration / monthly report / wallchart view
cons: Slack integration can be buggy Slack notification is hard to read Slack status does not update automatically for hourly leave type Cannot set notification for last minute leave summation
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The support team has been great, as employees learn to use it, it has been very helpful. I was thankful for the time they spent helping me learn.
author: Kristen C.
pros: ease of use for employee, that it is integrated in slack a system we already use, the team went out of their way to help me with the set up.
cons: a little harder to set up than I would have liked, we have so many people and departments it required me to think through all the possibilities, but in the end it worked.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Good overall easy to use. It is very user friendly and everything is organised really neatly within the app
author: Julian M.
pros: Easy to use. It is a good space to keep track of all the employees off days. It should also include a punch in punch out system for monitoring worked hours.
cons: Expensive monthly - and also the fact that it does not automatically produce a roster from the unavailabilities of the users - more detail example not just leave but available to work morning or evening
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A layout all employees can navigate
description: So far so good! We have only just purchased the software and are currently setting it up. We haven't had enough time to test with all staff
author: Crystal M.
pros: easy to understand great sales team, very helpful flexible pricing model easy to set up a tour aligns with gmail accounts
cons: cost for what we wanted was higher than competitors we wanted hours not days and this required us to go up in price
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It has served it's initial purpose for leave management in giving my employees visibility to their allocated leave time.
author: Theresa K.
pros: Leave Management and employee management. It took the manual process using spreadsheets to automation in a tracking tool.
cons: Reporting. Would like the ability to create some ad hoc reports per branch, or by division, or certain group of employees.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: My experience has been great and I have no issues at all. I would definitley reccommend this software as it is so user friendly and easy to undertand and use.
author: Georgina T.
pros: Very user friendly and easy to use. I like having the oprion of usin different versions of what calender I perfer to use.
cons: When you purchase the lower cost version you can't use the hourly add on unless you pay extra. It would be nice to have a few more options for items that you don't have to pay to add on.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Easy to use, wish there was HRIS integration
description: Works well, no issues. Easy to navigate. I really like how it has given our small team visibility into outages.
author: Sarah B.
pros: I like that there are records (logs, reports, etc.) and it is super easy to use. The system has not had any bugs or issues.
cons: I wish it integrated into our HRIS system (like JustWorks) because we have to track the PTO in two separate places. On days that there is no one on PTO, I'd prefer no alerts or just "forward-looking alerts" if there is someone leaving soon.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I love it for the cost and the employees have enjoyed how easy it is to operate. Also logging in and out is easy, attendance is a helpful thing to see but I wish the users couldn't see others time off.
author: Shania B.
pros: The simplicity and the teams integration. It makes payroll tracking a lot easier when we can easily click on each user.
cons: how the time off requests come through teams instead of an alert on the app and I wish the users couldn't see others time off.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: So far this has been amazing. From customer support to implentation, to everyday use this has been a smooth process.
author: Ashley F.
pros: I like the ease of use for both the administrator and the user. I enjoy how easily you can customize to your company's particular needs.
cons: Haven't found one yet. But I'll report back if that changes.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Casey N.
pros: I like the fact that you can go to "Teams" and request and approve time off, working from home, and sick days all from one place
cons: I don't like how it takes a few hours to update on your office calendar. On the website it updates immediately but not for the office calendar when you connect it unless you connect another vacation tracker then it does update automatically
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Even though I am relatively new user/admin, so far the experience has been a positive one and I believe it fits our organization's needs nicely!
author: Jonathan S.
pros: I love that it integrates directly with Microsoft Teams and Outlook so that employees can see everything in one application.
cons: It is a bit confusing to navigate as there are multiple ways in Teams to request leave, see your profile, cancel leaves, etc.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's been a great tool for us so far! All of our employees have caught on to it quickly.
author: Laura S.
pros: Easy to use. Has just about every feature we were looking for.
cons: Not being able to adjust when or if requests expire
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Thus far my experience has been good. As I mentioned above, no complaints on the platform. Products like this should be simple and this is that.
author: Holden E.
pros: Quite easy to use, for both myself and the team. Easy to set up, and great for the price. I kind of set and forget.
cons: Its hard to find online. I had to search through a bunch of bullshit competitors to land here. So maybe more SEO or AEO. Check out profound, I can link you with a rep there.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience with Vacation Tracker has always been good. It is user-friendly, and the first and ONLY time I had an issue, the problem was resolved quickly. Their customer service team is great as well. They always followed up with me through the entire process until my issue was resolved. Thank you!
author: Sheila H.
pros: What I like the most about Vacation Tracker is the ability to see how much leave time (vacation, sick time, bereavement, etc) you have available and what has been used.
cons: The only thing I don't like about the tool is only having 2 options for hours (8 hrs or 4 hrs). It would be great if we could select 2 hrs because sometimes, I don't need the entire 4 hrs.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Thankful that we found Vacation Tracker
description: Overall, we are happy with the product for the cost, the UI, and the ease of use. The VT team is nice and pretty easy to work with but the actual process of merging our data was a nightmare. I wish there was an easier way - honestly we were ready to pay VT for this service because our tiny team didn't have enough hours in the day to do it ourselves. We ended up outsourcing this task to another team with more bandwidth. I'd just suggest that VT include this as part of the pricing to onboard with the platform.
author: Maddie L.
pros: The simplicity of the platform and the ease of setting it up was great. We also love the Slack integration - this was huge for our global company.
cons: The merging of data was excruciating. It was NOT an easy process and required many hours to get the data exactly perfect for VT to be able to merge. This was really really difficult for our small HR team as we were in the midst of a hiring surge and nobody had the capacity to do this incredibly time consuming data gathering. The report from our old PTO tracker did not work for the needs of VT so someone had to go through a years worth of PTO/Sick Time, etc. for 50+ employees one by one.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great time off management system built right into Slack
author: Josh T.
pros: We love using Vacation Tracker because it was super easy to deploy across our full team, and the best part is that it integrates right into Slack. This is a big deal since we all spend most of our day with Slack open, so not having to worry about another app or website is nice. We also love the ability to create custom types of time off, since our company has many different categories of time off that all have different allotments.
cons: My only complaint would be that I wish the Vacation Tracker website was a little bit more robust. Sometimes I find it a little TOO simple. However, I think it's a double edged sword because I really do love the simplicity of its layout.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Thankful to have eliminated our clunky spreadsheets!
author: Avni P.
pros: Vacation Tracker is simple to use, and whenever we had an issue, customer service was INCREDIBLE about addressing our issues quickly.
cons: I wish the plans were more customizable. For example, our team needs the "Time Off in Lieu" feature for about half our staff (6 people). Unfortunately, we would have to upgrade all the way to Pro in order to get this feature. We'd be willing to pay a little bit more for just this one feature, but if we have to go all the way to pro, we can forgo the upgrade and work around this one issue.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Overall, Vacation Tracker has streamlined our time off request, approval and tracking processes very well. We're very happy with the service, and look forward to expanded functionality and features.
author: Michael G.
pros: Makes it very easy to manage time off requests and have visibility across departments and teams.
cons: Would like some additional reporting, or the ability to have the date/time that a request is submitted, the name of the approver, and approval date and time of a request be included in export data.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: I've been very happy with it and the wider team has had no issues adapting it. It offers great visibility and accountability for leave taken. They are always updating it and the support has been very responsive.
author: Olga V.
pros: Vacation Tracker has excellent integration with Slack and Google Calendar, with most leave requests and approvals done through Slack. The support team is extremely responsive and has been able to quickly solve any questions or issues we had with the app. The app itself is very easy to navigate and mostly self-explanatory. The leave policies, locations and approval flow are quite customisable and extremely user friendly. The leave accrual functionality has been a fantastic addition, and allowances can be adjusted by individual.
cons: Could us more flexibility in leave policies, for example ability to submit requests retroactively
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Mauricio R.
pros: Great to use! Simple and easy, and very user friendly.
cons: The payment. They should have an invoicing option.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Exactly what we were looking for
author: Chris May S.
pros: This is the exact product we were looking for. We went from spreadsheets and manually entering PTO on a shared calendar to Vacation Tracker. Easy to set up, integrated with Google Calendar, and cost effective. Our staff can now see their PTO balance by logging in vs. requesting a balance from management.
cons: Hard to find. We researched several solutions before stumbling across your product on a google search.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Zaymar C.
pros: Tracker is extremely user friendly and constantly updates new features. Support is extremely amazing and responsive.
cons: When we first started with VT, certain features were not available
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: So far our experience with the product has been very positive. It was easy to set up and show the employees how to use. As an administrator of the system the “wall chart” view is very useful for a quick glance for the day or week.
author: Pam S.
pros: The ease of setting it up and use by the employees was a critical piece. This product is very user friendly as well as easy for the administrator of the system to use and monitor.
cons: Wish it had the ability to customize a little more than what is available currently.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
